_comment: Public OAuth client credentials shipped by the upstream Gemini CLI (https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli). Per RFC 8252 (OAuth for Native Apps) and Google's installed-app docs, these are NOT secrets — they identify the client app, not the end user, and are intentionally embedded in the redistributable. We mirror upstream's values verbatim so token refresh works against the same client_id Gemini's own auth flow registered. Treat this file as configuration, not a credential.
